uk: Святого отця нашого Юліана, єпископа Кеноманійського
saints.en: Synaxis of the Holy Archangel Gabriel. Ven. Stephen the Sabbaite. St. Julian, Bishop of Le Mans

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизми нема. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 архангела, 3 прп., Сл.: архангела, г. 6, «Радуйтеся з нами»[5] І нині: богород. за гл. Сл. Стиховня Октоїха, Сл., І нині: архангела, г. 8, «Як чиноначальник». По «Отче наш»: тр. «Небесних воїнств архистратиги», Сл.: прп., І нині: богород. за гл. Сл. і за днем тижня.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тр. «Небесних воїнств архистратиги», Сл.: прп. І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тр. прп. Катизми черг., сідал. Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канонів 3: 1-й Октоїха, ап. і прп. Катавасія тільки по 3-ій, 6-ій, 8-ій та 9-ій пісні – ірмос канону прп. По 3-ій – конд.-ікос прп. і сідал. ап., Сл.: сідал. прп., І нині: його богород. По 6-ій – конд.-ікос ап.; по 9-ій – світил. Октоїха, світил. ап., Сл.: прп., І нині: богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тр. ап., Сл.: прп., І нині: богород. за гласом тр. прп. і за днем тижня.
Часи: на 1-му тр. і конд. – дня; на 3-му - архангела, на 6-му – храму, на 9-му - прп.
Літургія: вся служба дня. Ап. – 1 Кор. 142 зач.; 9, 13-18. Єв. – Мт. 65 зач.; 16, 1-6.

troparion_en.text: Gabriel, commander of the heavenly hosts, / we who are unworthy beseech you, / by your prayers encompass us beneath the wings of your immaterial glory, / and faithfully preserve us who fall down and cry to you: / “Deliver us from all harm, for you are the commander of the powers on high!”

kontakion_en.text: You look upon God’s glory in heaven, / and bring grace from on high to earth, / wise Gabriel, leader of angels, / minister of God’s glory, and divine defender of the world! / Save and preserve those who cry to you: / “Be our defense, so that no one can be against us!”

troparion.text: Gabriel, commander of the heavenly hosts, / we who are unworthy beseech you, / by your prayers encompass us beneath the wings of your immaterial glory, / and faithfully preserve us who fall down and cry to you: / “Deliver us from all harm, for you are the commander of the powers on high!”

kontakion.text: You look upon God’s glory in heaven, / and bring grace from on high to earth, / wise Gabriel, leader of angels, / minister of God’s glory, and divine defender of the world! / Save and preserve those who cry to you: / “Be our defense, so that no one can be against us!”

oca_saints.name: Venerable Stephen of Saint Savva Monastery

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Stephen, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Saint Julian, Bishop of Cenomanis (Le Mans), Gaul

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Julian, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

Your holy martyr Serapion, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Serapion;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Marcian, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Marcian;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

oca_saints.name: Virgin Abbess Sarah of Sketis in Libya

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy mother Sarah, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
